launches.title: CodeCanary 🐤 Your AI Product Engineer
launches.tagline: CodeCanary uses session replays to fix bugs, boost conversion, monitor leads and customers, and answer any question.
launches.detail_body:
CodeCanary connects coding agents to your product analytics to find and fix bugs, improve conversion, track leads and customers, and answer anything about your product. CodeCanary runs autonomously and lives in Slack. 

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99155&key=user_uploads/786838/893e9400-0075-43e6-ae0b-f3fc42a3d1a6)

# Problem

Your product analytics are a rich source of information, but it’s hard to always be getting the most out of them. There are not enough hours in the day to watch every session replay, catch every bug your users face, and always be running experiments on your bottlenecks. 

# Solution

CodeCanary is [always watching your product](https://www.codecanary.ai/blog/watching-session-replays-with-ai) to see where it can help. For example, CodeCanary:

1\. Spots users who interact with bugs, looks through your code for the cause, and submits a PR with a fix. It also can tell you who was impacted.

\
2. Identifies conversion bottlenecks, creates A/B experiments, and submits the variant as a PR. CodeCanary can also run low-risk experiments on autopilot directly on your website without any human oversight, as desired.

3\. Tracks and reports back on high value prospects, however you define them.

\
4. Answers any other questions you might have about your users and how they interact with your product (e.g. "in the reduce landing page interactivity experiment can you please break down the demo booked results by device type?").

# Try CodeCanary

You can sign up for CodeCanary here! <https://www.codecanary.ai> 

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99155&key=user_uploads/786838/424e65f8-a2a4-4871-b442-75d9f2b3ecbf)

launches.title: Cognitio Labs – Real-time food traceability for safety and compliance
launches.tagline: Automating real-time food traceability for FDA compliance
launches.detail_body:
[Cognitio Labs](https://cognitioiq.com) is an applied AI research lab building real-time compliance infrastructure for regulated supply chains, serving as the first line of defense against recalls and regulatory failure.

View our launch video at: [**https://youtu.be/iFD6vxaS0eY**](https://youtu.be/iFD6vxaS0eY)

When a food contamination event happens, time is everything. If traceability takes days instead of hours, entire product categories get destroyed, brands lose trust, and recalls cost $10M to $100M+.

Yet today, most operators still rely on spreadsheets, PDFs, and manual logs. Traceability data is fragmented across facilities, systems, and partners, and critical events like temperature, handling, and lot transformations are not automatically captured or standardized. As a result, generating accurate, regulator-ready records is slow, manual, and error-prone.

**Why now:** The FDA’s [FSMA 204 rule](https://www.fda.gov/food/food-safety-modernization-act-fsma/fsma-final-rule-requirements-additional-traceability-records-certain-foods) requires companies to produce standardized, lot-level digital traceability records within 24 hours by 2028, impacting over 60,000 U.S. food facilities. The regulatory bar is rising, but the infrastructure to meet it requires improvement.

We are building that infrastructure.

Our system uses sensors and AI to automatically capture key events such as temperature, humidity, handling, and lot-level movements across production, storage, and transit. We convert fragmented operational data into standardized, FSMA 204-compliant traceability records and generate regulator-ready reports in real time.

Compliance is generated as operations happen, not after.

This becomes the first line of defense by enabling faster recalls, reducing spoilage, eliminating manual compliance work, and protecting contracts, insurance coverage, and brand equity. Avoiding even one major recall can save $10 million to over $100 million.

Cognitio Labs was founded by [Diva Avaya Sharma](https://www.linkedin.com/in/diva-sharma/), a Stanford-trained technologist who previously built a patented remote patient monitoring system integrating sensors and machine learning in regulated healthcare environments, recognized by global development institutions and national innovation programs.

We are starting with food and expanding into other regulated, high-risk supply chains.

Learn more at [**cognitioiq.com**](http://cognitioiq.com).

Follow our Linkedin Page [**here**](https://www.linkedin.com/company/110755112/)**.**

launches.title: F4 - The GD&T Analysis Platform for Engineering Drawings
launches.tagline: (without using AI for analysis!)
launches.detail_body:
GD&T takes years to master, and even experienced engineers can interpret the same drawing differently. When design intent is unclear, issues tend to surface later in interface stack-ups, manufacturing, or worse, in the field where fixes become far more expensive.\
\
We built F4 to address that. \
\
F4 - The GD&T Analysis Platform for Engineering Drawings\
\
Upload a drawing and 3D model and F4 analyzes the GD&T to assess whether the design is clear, manufacturable, and inspectable. Engineers can visualize datum reference frames and tolerance zones directly on the 3D model, instantly calculate stack-ups from the drawing, and identify issues before they become costly problems.\
\
F4 also generates the reports teams need to move forward, including stack-up tables and FAI documentation.\
\
All analysis runs locally on-device using deterministic algorithms, producing reliable results engineers can trust. \
\
Watch the video below to see how it works. 

<https://youtu.be/Bfsxwxq6r1s>\
\
To evaluate whether your designs are truly production ready, book a demo of the F4 Enterprise platform on [**https://f4.dev**](https://f4.dev) and see our full GD&T coverage.\
\
Or try F4 Lite at <http://f4.dev/lite> - our advanced PDF engineering drawing viewer built to replace browsers and tools like Acrobat for reviewing prints!

launches.title: Webhound Agent: A full research assistant with a workspace
launches.tagline: An AI research assistant powered by the best deep research money can buy
launches.detail_body:
**The problem:** Most deep research products decide for you when to stop. And since they're subscription-based, the less work they do per query, the more they profit.

**What we built:** Webhound is a research agent where you set a dollar budget and it keeps searching until it's used. $5 or $100 — every dollar goes into deeper search, more sources, and real verification. The output is either a cited research report or a structured dataset with source URLs per cell.

**What's new:** Today we're launching Webhound Agent — a full research assistant with a workspace.

* **Start research from chat.** Describe what you need, the agent proposes a session with an editable budget and model. You confirm before anything runs.
* **Multi-step pipelines.** Chain steps together — "research X, then extract Y, then write a recommendation" — and they run automatically in sequence.
* **Analyze your existing work.** Ask the agent about any report or dataset. It reads the full document and answers with citations.
* **Organize everything in folders.** Nested workspace with drag-and-drop, working directories, and folder-scoped context.
* **The agent remembers you.** It learns your research interests, budget preferences, and working patterns across conversations.

**How it works under the hood:** Research sessions run a plan-execute-verify loop. The planner decides what to investigate, the executor searches the web and writes a cited report, and the verifier checks every claim against its sources. When the verifier finds gaps, it sends the work back. This cycle repeats until the budget runs out.

**Pricing:** Pay-as-you-go. No subscriptions. $5 free credits to start. See real example reports at different budgets: <https://webhound.ai/examples>\
\
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=csm6x3carjc>

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99089&key=user_uploads/1444435/efda94f3-8921-4230-98e9-e26f86b3514c)

launches.title: mdhub - AI native operating system for behavioral health clinics
launches.tagline: 🚀 mdhub just shipped the full stack.
launches.detail_body:
**mdhub just shipped the full stack.**

We started mdhub with a simple belief: the biggest barrier to behavioral health care isn't the shortage of great clinicians. It's the broken infrastructure they're forced to work with.

Clinics run on five disconnected systems stitched together with duct tape. One for scheduling. One for documentation. One for billing. One for admissions. One for patient communication. None of them talk to each other. Clinicians waste hours every day navigating this mess instead of seeing patients.

Today, mdhub is the first AI-native operating system for behavioral health clinics. One platform where AI workers and clinical teams work together across admissions, clinical operations, and billing. Your AI workforce and AI-native EHR, in one

**Here's how we got here.**

Emma, our AI clinical assistant, has been used in over 3 million patient sessions across more than 1 million patients this past year. That's 500,000+ hours of admin work given back to clinicians. Hours they now spend seeing patients.

Sarah, our AI admissions coordinator, has booked over 100,000 patients into care. She handles 100% of inbound calls and texts for clinics, 24/7. She verifies insurance in real time, completes intake before the first appointment, and books patients in minutes, not days. Clinics using Sarah are booking 30% more new patients without adding a single person to their front desk. 

Eric, our AI billing agent, 10x billing teams, handling coding, claims submission, and denial management. Same-day claim submission. Higher accuracy than manual teams.

**Today we're launching three new products.**

**mdhub EHR**: a clinical workspace built from the ground up for AI, not retrofitted. Documentation, intake, treatment planning, e-prescribing, billing all in one place. 

**mdhub CRM**: admissions pipeline management where nothing falls through the cracks. Every lead was captured. Every follow-up is automated. First response time drops from 48 hours to 5 minutes. Clinics are converting 3x more leads without adding headcount. 

**mdhub RCM**: end-to-end revenue cycle management. From claim submission to collections, AI-powered and fully integrated.

**Why this matters:**

Behavioral health clinics can now run admissions, clinical operations, and billing in one place where their human team and AI workers collaborate across every workflow. No more logging into five systems. No more data falling between the cracks. No more choosing between an EHR that can't do billing and a billing tool that can't do clinical work. One platform that lets clinics scale with AI workers and an AI-native OS, not more headcount.

One platform. Human teams and AI workers, working together.

mdhub. Better operations. Elevated care.

👉[Book a demo](https://calendly.com/liza-mdhub/30min).

launches.title: GojiberryAI - AI GTM brain that detects buying intent, runs conversations, and books qualified demos automatically
launches.tagline: We turn hours of manual prospecting into a predictable flow of qualified demos by handling the entire GTM execution.
launches.detail_body:
Hey everyone, we’re [Pierre-Eliott](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pierre-eliott-lallemant-343a2b199/), [Romàn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rom%C3%A0n-czerny-11b773199/) and [Dylan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dylan-txa/) - cofounders of [GojiberryAI ](https://gojiberry.ai)👋

\
**TL;DR**

**\
GojiberryAI identifies high intent leads, detects real buying signals, and automatically launches personalized conversations on LinkedIn from one single platform.**

We scaled from $0 to $1.4M ARR in 9 months and have already generated millions in pipeline for our customers.

What makes us unique is how quickly we identify real buying signals within your ICP.

On average, our customers see 2 to 5x higher reply rates with GojiberryAI thanks to high intent lead targeting.

[**https://youtu.be/wlzk3LHZklU**](https://youtu.be/wlzk3LHZklU)

**_Ask:_** Are you currently looking to generate more qualified demos?

Let’s show you how.

Try our [free trial ](https://gojiberry.ai)here or [book a demo](https://calendly.com/roman-gojiberry/gojiberry-ai-demo-with-the-founders-clone-1) here.

# 🔴 **The problem**

The B2B sales market runs on millions of companies trying to generate pipeline every day.

Yet most teams still use a stack of tools that don’t really work together.

So what happens:

Most outbound goes to people who will never buy

Reply rates stay stuck around 2–3%

The best opportunities are missed or reached too late

There’s no real system behind it :

You don’t know which ICP actually converts.

You don’t know which signals matter.

And every time you launch a new campaign, you’re basically starting from scratch.

Most tools just execute. They don’t learn. They don’t improve.

So you keep sending more messages, hoping something works.

That’s exactly where our GTM Brain comes in to fix this.

# ✅ **What we built**

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99079&key=user_uploads/2152249/40b7c25b-4fb7-4775-98c3-832c661c5a08)

GojiberryAI is the GTM brain for modern sales teams.

We started with outbound and are building toward owning the entire pipeline generation stack.

Today we handle:

High intent lead detection : we track buying signals across LinkedIn and identify prospects who are actually in market

Lead enrichment and scoring : every lead is qualified based on ICP fit and real intent signals

Personalized outreach : we automatically generate and send messages tailored to the exact trigger event

Conversation management : follow ups are handled intelligently to turn replies into booked meetings

Our goal is simple: replace the fragmented stack of scraping tools, CRMs, and outreach tools with one system that actually drives pipeline.

# 📈 **Traction**

$0 → $112K MRR in 9 months, 44% MoM growth

1000+ paying customers

Our customers see 2 to 5x higher reply rates compared to traditional outreach.

# [**👬**](https://emojipedia.org/men-holding-hands) The Team

Romàn, Pierre-Eliott, and Dylan have worked closely together and co-founded GojiberryAI, the GTM Brain for small sales teams.

Pierre-Eliott (CEO) is a French entrepreneur and repeat founder. He previously co-founded and exited CoCo AI. He leads product, vision, and company strategy, driving GojiberryAI’s positioning and execution as it scales toward $10M+ ARR.

Dylan (CTO) is a French entrepreneur and co-founder of GojiberryAI. He previously co-founded Edusign, a paperless attendance SaaS that scaled to multi-million ARR before being sold in 2025. He leads engineering and AI systems, building the infrastructure that enables real-time intent detection, automated outreach, and end-to-end conversation management.

Romàn (CMO) is a French entrepreneur and repeat founder. He previously co-founded CoCo AI, a Shopify app that grew to \~$500K ARR before being sold in 2025. He leads go-to-market, growth, and distribution, with a strong focus on turning high-intent signals into pipeline and revenue.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99079&key=user_uploads/2152249/3c71b87b-c41b-42f3-89d0-0fab0ea51516)

**_Ask:_** Are you currently looking to generate more qualified demos?

Let’s show you how.

Try our [free trial ](https://gojiberry.ai)here or [book a demo](https://calendly.com/roman-gojiberry/gojiberry-ai-demo-with-the-founders-clone-1) here.

launches.title: Accend For Banking
launches.tagline: AI Infrastructure for End-to-End Credit Underwriting in Commercial Banks
launches.detail_body:
```
Introduction
```

Accend for Banking is AI infrastructure that helps banks turn financial documents into structured financial models and credit insights — from hours to minutes.

Built for commercial banks and CRE lenders, it sits inside existing credit workflows and removes the most manual parts of underwriting, so banks can move faster and win more deals.

<https://youtu.be/ZZZYw-Q0XLQ>

---

```
The Problem
```

Credit underwriting in banks is slow because it still relies on legacy systems and outdated tools that haven’t evolved in decades.

Across most banks today:

* Financial documents are collected across emails, portals, and shared drives
* Borrowers upload tax returns, financials, and supporting documents across fragmented systems
* Data is manually extracted and spread into Excel
* Financial models are rebuilt repeatedly for each case
* Credit memos are written from scratch every time
* Monitoring and covenant tracking happen separately

These workflows are:

* Fragmented across systems
* Manual and time-intensive
* Difficult to scale without adding headcount
* Prone to inconsistencies and errors

Even as lending demand has increased, the infrastructure supporting underwriting has remained largely unchanged for decades.

---

```
What This Means for Banks
```

The impact of these workflows goes beyond operations — it directly affects people, speed, and business outcomes.

* Analysts spend hours on data preparation instead of credit decisions
* Turnaround times slow down lending and delay decisions
* Banks lose deals to faster competitors
* Productivity is lost across the workflow due to repeated manual effort
* Scaling requires adding headcount instead of improving systems

At a time when speed matters more than ever, these constraints make it harder for banks to compete.

---

```
How Accend Helps
```

Accend brings these fragmented steps into a single, structured workflow.

With Accend:

* Borrowers upload tax and financial documents through a single secure link or connect their accounting systems
* Automated requests and reminders keep document collection moving
* Financial documents are parsed into structured, audit-ready data in minutes
* Detailed schedules and supporting statements are captured with high accuracy
* Property-level data (e.g., Schedule E, Form 8825) is broken down with full visibility
* Cash flow models are generated instantly and mapped consistently
* Credit insights and memos are built on top of structured data

This means:

* Analysts spend time on credit decisions, not data preparation
* Turnaround times shrink from hours to minutes
* Teams can handle more volume without increasing headcount
* Outputs remain consistent across deals

---

```
How Accend Works
```

Accend integrates into your existing credit workflow and processes each case end-to-end:

**1. Document Intake**

Send a secure link to borrowers to upload tax and financial documents, or connect directly to accounting systems. Automated requests and reminders ensure completeness.

**2. Data Extraction & Structuring**

Accend parses full tax packages in minutes — including 1040s, 1065s, 1120s, 1120-S, and supporting schedules — and converts them into structured, audit-ready data with source traceability.

**3. Detailed Financial Spreading**

Financials are standardized across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flows. Supporting statements and add-backs are surfaced automatically.

**4. Modeling & Analysis**

Data maps instantly into cash flow models. Teams can drill into sources, override values, run ratios, and leave notes — with every change tracked.

**5. Configurable Financial Models**

Models are configured to your bank’s policies — personal, business, global — ensuring consistency across teams while supporting complex analysis.

**6. Monitoring & Covenant Tracking**

Once underwriting is complete, covenants are tracked automatically with scheduled tests, due dates, and alerts.

---

```
Get Started
```

If you work in credit, underwriting, risk, or lending operations, Accend helps you modernize your workflow without replacing your systems.

[Schedule a call with Pranjal](https://calendly.com/pranjal-accend/30min), our co-founder, to learn more.

Or explore Accend for Banking → <https://www.withaccend.com/banking>

launches.title: Vision Lab: The Industrial Data Layer for Robotics
launches.tagline: Aggregating the Largest Manufacturing Process Data for Robotics Training
launches.detail_body:
## **TL;DR**

We capture and structure real factory workflows at scale, pairing first-person industrial video with SOP-level process knowledge, so robotics and AI labs can train models on the data that actually exists inside production environments, not just lab demos. We are already working with 2 frontier AI labs.

🎥 **Our 60-second Product Launch**:\
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u2CyfEnYY5A>

## **THE PROBLEM**

The robotics industry is being trained mostly on lab demos, even though robots will ultimately need to operate in messy, high-variance real factories. The industry has **less than 0.3% of the data it needs**, and almost none of it comes from real factory environments.

Why?

**Industrial data does not exist at scale**\
It cannot be scraped or passively collected. It has to be captured inside real factories, on real production lines, during real operations.

**Raw footage is not enough**\
Unstructured industrial video is noise. Models need process context: what step is happening, in what order, with what tools, and whether it was done correctly.

**Crowdsourcing cannot solve it**\
Understanding industrial actions requires factory expertise. Anyone can label an object; far fewer can distinguish whether a torque check, weld, inspection, or setup sequence was performed correctly.

---

## **THE SOLUTION**

Vision Lab solves the industrial data problem by building:

**The most diverse industrial dataset**\
SOP-structured production data spanning cutting-edge environments like biotech, EV manufacturing, semiconductors, and medical devices, as well as large-scale manufacturing.

**Industrial access at scale**\
A network of **2,000+ factories across 50+ industries in 27 countries**, with operators and factory owners embedded in the capture process so every sequence, tool, and technique is recorded correctly at the source.

**A proprietary VLM for industrial settings**\
A temporal VLM trained on SOP-paired industrial footage to understand not just what is happening, but the **order, timing, and correctness** of real industrial processes. Our state-of-the-art VLM outperforms Gemini by **2.5x on temporal understanding in industrial settings**.

---

## **PARTNER WITH US**

If you believe the next decade of robotics and world models will depend on **real-world industrial data, not just compute**, we’d love to talk.

Vision Lab partners with robotics labs, frontier AI teams, and manufacturers to build the default industrial data layer for robotics.

**Contact:** [founders@thevisionlab.ai](mailto:founders@thevisionlab.ai)\
**More info**: [www.thevisionlab.ai](http://www.thevisionlab.ai)

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99007&key=user_uploads/2371704/81b524d4-30fd-40cf-9b55-6cacc2bcaffb)

launches.title: Remix 🎨 Auto-generate social content with your existing data
launches.tagline: Turn your raw ideas into content with parallel AI agents
launches.detail_body:
**The Problem**

Everyone has content worth sharing. Insights from conversations, thoughts in voice memos, photos on their camera roll. But turning raw material into polished content is a grind. Recording, editing, writing, designing. It turns into a second job. So most people never create, and the internet stays dominated by a small group of professional creators.

**The Solution**

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99005&key=user_uploads/1294638/ef896e45-a7ea-44b1-a965-b56973d9fe18)

Remix takes anything you already have. Audio notes, text notes, photos, your social profile, even messages. It automatically generates images, articles, tweets, videos, and more.

No prompting. No editing. You just feed it your raw data and Remix spins up parallel AI agents that figure out what is worth creating and produce it for you.

You can launch tens of agents at once, each working on a different piece of content. Chat with them, ask for tweaks, request variations. It feels like having a full creative team that works in seconds.

**Why This Matters**

The content in your feed is already social. People sharing their routines, their days, their photo dumps. It's just all from strangers. When everyone can create this effortlessly, social media will finally be truely social.

We are the first company bringing Claude Code to consumers. Unleashing the most powerful agentic harness’s power for more than code.

**Our Ask**

[Try Remix](https://remix.re/) and tell us what you think. Drop in your LinkedIn or Twitter username and we’ll instantly create content just for you.

We would love your feedback. Email us at [founders@remix.re](mailto:founders@remix.re).

launches.title: Minicor - Self-healing desktop automations that scale.
launches.tagline: Managed, self-healing desktop automations that scale.
launches.detail_body:
Hey YC!! Faiz and Saheed here from Minicor ([minicor.com](http://minicor.com))

**TLDR;** AI companies selling into healthcare, automotive, financial services, and logistics can't go live because their customers run on legacy desktop software with no APIs. The only way in is clicking through the UI, and it breaks constantly. Minicor is a platform for building self-healing desktop automation that scales.

Launch video:\
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nzH4ekkaA2c>

**The problem**

Our customers selling into legacy industries can't go live because the systems of record their customers use (EHRs, ERPs, DMS) are Windows desktop apps with no APIs. The only way to read / write is through UI automations, but desktop RPA at scale breaks constantly. Even small error rates become hundreds of failures a day, and every one needs manual intervention.

They're signing customers but don't have capacity to integrate because they're too busy fighting fires with existing RPAs; or their prospects are blocked because they need "proof" they can write back to their systems, and spinning up a desktop automation POC takes too long.

**In production**

We're live right now processing thousands of workflows a week across healthcare EHRs and other legacy systems. Our agents write AI-generated data into desktop apps in real-time. We went live with a customer in 3 weeks post POC.

**How it works**

1. Install our Desktop Client on the machines running the legacy software.
2. Speak the automation into existence - either through your favourite coding agent via our MCP, or to us directly. You get an API endpoint to trigger it.
3. Minicor handles everything after that. Only pay when the data gets in

**Demos**

Generating an automation with our MCP:

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99004&key=user_uploads/1037983/3566b35e-8721-428e-9c8c-99b2d4f337a4)

Agent recovering from failure:

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99004&key=user_uploads/1037983/c33c944c-0319-4aa1-a291-c526751938f6)

Recorded video replays of every run, with full error logging, so nothing ever fails silently:

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=99004&key=user_uploads/1037983/ce87bffc-0860-43ab-a1b9-94d5b5656adf)

**About us**

Saheed and I both started our careers building bespoke / legacy system integrations. Me at a YC startup, Saheed at Morgan Stanley and Ford. We met in 2019 in a UX class, built a non-profit together over the pandemic, and started working on this in 2023.

We started with an observability and error recovery platform for API integrations, and got pulled into Desktop automations when a prospect closed hyper quickly on the promise that we could help them connect to an on-prem EMR.

**If a legacy desktop integration is blocking a deal right now**

**We can have a POC running in hours.** Whether that's a demo for a prospect or getting something into production next week. Email / DM us on Bookface / book time to chat (:

**Know an AI company fighting horrible desktop based UI integrations?** We'd appreciate an intro, coffee / lunch on us!

[faiz@minicor.com](mailto:faiz@minicor.com) / <https://calendly.com/faiz-laminar/minicor-demo>

launches.title: Patientdesk.ai: AI Native Operating System for Dental Clinics
launches.tagline: All-in-one operating system built for real dental workflows.
launches.detail_body:
**TL;DR:** Patientdesk handles inbound and outbound calls, scheduling, live insurance verification, claims submission, and billing for dental clinics — all in one system. We grew from $17K to $50K MRR in 8 weeks and have driven $1.8M in incremental revenue for our customers.\
\
<https://youtu.be/1liipoEyTuk> 

👋 **Hi, we're Oncel, Şan, and Emre.**

We've been best friends since 2016. All three of us ranked #1 nationwide out of 1.2 million students on the Turkish national exam, ended up in the same high school dorm room, and have been working together ever since. Before Patientdesk, we ran a dental marketing agency and our own call center for two years. We didn't find this problem. It found us.

🔴 **The problem**

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98988&key=user_uploads/2594817/da263c64-fc8a-45ab-a59f-a1bbb5702156)

The US dental industry processes $189 billion in services annually across 135,000 clinic locations. Yet the average practice runs on five disconnected tools that don't talk to each other. The consequences are severe:

* 15% of insurance claims are denied, 80% of those denials are preventable
* 65% of denied claims are never resubmitted
* Front desk staff spend up to 20 hours per week on manual insurance verification alone

Every time data moves between tools, a human moves it manually. A wrong code, a missing attachment, a verification that never made it to the claim. The clinic doesn't get paid. This is not a staffing problem. It's a coordination problem. And you can't fix a coordination problem by adding more tools.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98988&key=user_uploads/2594817/e7b525fc-ccb3-434f-be85-43a83ae665fd)

✅ **What we built**

Patientdesk is the AI-native operating system for dental practices. We started with the front office and we're building toward owning the entire stack.

Today we handle:

* **Inbound and outbound calls** — 24/7 coverage, no missed calls, no voicemails
* **Scheduling** — books directly into the practice management software
* **Live insurance verification** — we are the first system to verify insurance during the booking call, in real time, without any manual handoff
* **Claims submission and denial follow-up** — we submit claims directly and follow up on denials automatically so clinics stop leaving money on the table
* **Payments and billing** — automated reminders and collection

Our goal is to replace the $15,000/month stack clinics currently use with a single platform starting at $7,500/month.

📈 **Traction**

* $17K → $50K MRR in 8 weeks, 39% MoM growth
* $1.8M in incremental revenue driven for customers since September 2025
* 60+ clinics live across the US, Australia, and the UK
* Official voice provider for 2 major practice management platforms

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98988&key=user_uploads/2594817/d5a474a4-d274-4e8c-850a-7609529246a4)

🙏 **Our ask**

launches.title: Repaint: The AI Website Builder
launches.tagline: Build a website by chatting with AI
launches.detail_body:
We’re [Ben](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-shumaker-9b2620238/) and [Izak](https://www.linkedin.com/in/izak-fritz-3b8579120/), and we’re proud to introduce the new Repaint (S23).

Repaint is the best AI tool for creating professional marketing websites. You chat with Repaint, plan the style and pages, and import your content. Then Repaint generates a custom website in minutes.

**Demo:** <https://youtu.be/HkL9yoQOyOQ>

**The Problem**\
AI coding tools are incredibly powerful now, but most people still make websites with Wix and Squarespace. Vibe coding tools like Lovable, Bolt, and Replit can generate a webpage from a prompt in a few minutes, but beyond that they’ve focused more on app building than marketing sites:

* They generate single pages with generic content, leaving you to build the rest.
* The visual style is hard to control, with few resources for inspiration.
* They surface technical details like code, hosting providers, and github integrations.
* They charge per edit, so finishing a large marketing site is expensive.

There’s no major AI tool focused on making polished websites for small businesses, entrepreneurs, and marketers. That’s what we’re building.

**The Solution**\
Repaint is an AI website builder designed to get you to a finished site, not just a starting point.

* **It starts by learning about you.** Repaint interviews you about your business, what pages you need, and what style you're going for. It can research your company online and import existing content.
* **You control the style.** You can pick a theme, provide reference links, and upload inspiration images. Or, you can let Repaint design it for you.
* **It generates a complete site.** Repaint makes full websites with your real information. And it can recreate the same pages from an existing website.
* **You edit with chat.** Restyle the whole site, add pages, update info across every page, redesign sections.
* **It writes real code.** So it can build things template-based builders can't like custom animations, interactive components, calculators, and complex forms.
* **Flat monthly pricing.** No per-edit credits.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98979&key=user_uploads/1045360/65931443-8184-450c-876c-89dcaf327f5f)

We opened Repaint about a month ago, and we’ve had hundreds of people make sites for tons of different businesses including YC startups, bakeries, cycling coaches, and more.

**Our Background**\
Repaint is actually our second website builder. During YC S23, we built a different website builder with a drag-and-drop interface inspired by Figma. Despite our best efforts, we never got it off the ground. The existing website builders were already heavily optimized, and the AI wave was rapidly making manual no-code tools obsolete.

But those years gave us deep expertise in web layout, editor UX, and what actually makes people give up on building a site. We think that's exactly what AI website building needs — not just better models, but a team that understands the challenges well enough to make it reliable.

**Our Ask**\
If you or someone you know needs a website, you can try it at [repaint.com](https://repaint.com)

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98979&key=user_uploads/1045360/3fb2e2fb-d58e-41a9-89a1-c8afe08c8e21)

launches.title: 🍼 👶 Brown Foods:  ‘Real’ Human Milk without any breast feeding!🥛
launches.tagline: Using mammalian cell culture, AI enabled to create complex natural products like cow milk and human milk now!
launches.detail_body:
**Have you experienced any problems with breast feeding? Or do you have any concerns with infant formulas? We would like to understand your concerns as we are creating real human milk using biotechnology. Please share your contact info [here](https://forms.gle/gy64yfLuJ1MtnfmD8) and we will connect to schedule a quick 20 mins call to understand your concerns.**

### **UnReal Human Milk! 🍼 👶**

> **_Why? - Lactation Issues in Women are at an all-time High!_**

Every year around 85 million women globally struggle with breast feeding in some way or the other. The existing infant formulas are largely based on cow milk which naturally lacks several essential components of human milk like lactoferrin, HMOs etc. which are critical for the nutrition of the baby. Recently there was one of the biggest recalls in history of infant formula in Dec 2025, with a similar recall in US in 2022 which led to sudden shortage of infant formulas and left parents extremely worried and vulnerable. To circumvent such incidents we need more clean-label innovation in this space to create better and more robust solutions for infant nutrition.

> **_What and How? - Harnessing Biology Responsibly!_**

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98944&key=user_uploads/215532/88fc5eaf-d775-43a4-86a0-104692179c41)

🚀 🚀 **Huge** **Breakthrough** - **We have been able to secrete Real Human Milk in lab!!!** We have validated all proteins by independent third party testing and have also tested for fats and carbohydrates to create a basic version of real human milk. By using mammalian cell culture we have designed a system to produce human milk in lab with a macronutrient focus currently. We are a Stanford, Rice University and IIT Delhi alumni team with backgrounds across biotechnology, business and innovation, determined to make a huge impact by using technology and leveraging recent advances in understanding of biological systems. This breakthrough leverages our extensive work on cow milk ([Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/daphneewingchow/2025/02/24/first-lab-grown-whole-cows-milk-to-debut-in-the-us/)) as we add this new product to our pipeline - UnReal Human Milk.

> **_More Exciting Stuff! - Why should human adults drink cow’s milk and not human milk?_**

Until now we had no way to mass produce human milk so we resorted to drinking cow milk since we could keep the poor cows in captivity to produce as much milk as needed. But now with our standardised scalable approach to creating human milk maybe we can move everyone across the planet from drinking cow milk to human milk. Think human milk ice-creams and human milk cheeses - the opportunities are huge!

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98944&key=user_uploads/215532/0b9233c8-9808-4043-83e6-e350806da38b)

> **Reach-out to us** at [**sohail@brownfoods.in**](mailto:sohail@brownfoods.in) if you want to collaborate, invest or partner with us on this journey.

Thank you!

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98944&key=user_uploads/215532/db9850e5-7d88-42fb-9ea4-871d78b1dd1f)

launches.title: Carma: We replaced fleet operations with software.
launches.tagline: AI that runs fleet ops end-to-end, unlocking revenue and curbing costs.
launches.detail_body:
**We manage 10,000+ vehicles for Fortune 500 companies with a team of 10.**

8 months ago, we scrapped our original model and rebuilt Carma as an AI-native operating system for fleet operations.

Since then, every metric has compounded.

⸻

**The problem**

Fleet maintenance is the #1 cost for companies that run vehicles.

And it’s still managed with:

* 15+ disconnected tools
* spreadsheets
* phone calls

Million-dollar decisions happen daily.

Made by people who:

* aren’t automotive experts
* aren’t incentivized on cost

So they approve everything.

Management can’t keep up. The problem requires deep technical context. It gets ignored.

As fleets grow, complexity snowballs.

The double-effect is vicious:

Vehicle uptime drops while costs spiral.

Margins bleed heavily.

⸻

**Why incumbents fail**

The incumbent software providers are 30+ year-old leasing companies.

They make money when fleets replace vehicles more often.

So real optimization works against them.

Their software reflects it:

* system of record
* not system of intelligence

_In reality:_ glorified Google Drive with manual data entry.

No automation. No decisions. No leverage.

⸻

**What we built**

Carma replaces the entire stack.

Our AI system, Neo, runs fleet operations end-to-end:

* automates all repetitive daily workflows
* replaces all manual labor
* replaces all fragmented software

And makes optimal decisions:

* verifies pricing
* selects vendors
* schedules maintenance
* audits invoices
* determines replacement timing

Not when a leasing company wants to sell a new vehicle.

When it actually makes economic sense.

Every service makes Neo smarter.

Customers don’t add Carma.

They replace everything with it.

⸻

**Traction**

* +10,100+ vehicles in 8 months, growing \~35%+ MoM
* 13 enterprise customers (all $100M+ revenue, including F500 clients)
* 100% customer retention
* $2,500+ value per vehicle annually
* 7.6x average cash ROI for customers

⸻

**Why now**

AI can finally automate judgment, not just data entry.

_Before:_ hire more people or accept inefficiency.

_Now:_ neither.

⸻

**Team**

Built to win this market:

* CEO: $60B+ M&A in automotive & fleet
* Chief Growth Officer: Scaled a medical practice portfolio from $5M to $31M while in med school
* CTO: ML infra at Google Cloud, real-time systems at Discord
* Head of Ops: ASE Master Tech, built ALLDATA international ops

⸻

**If you’re an investor or operator in this space, email us:**

[muhammad@joincarma.com](mailto:muhammad@joincarma.com) - Muhammad Alasgarli, Founder and CEO

[suleyman@joincarma.com](mailto:suleyman@joincarma.com) - Suleyman Alasgarli, Founder and Chief Growth Officer

launches.title: Overstand: A personal data team for Execs
launches.tagline: Business leaders have ideas all the time. Overstand lets them validate and act upon them in just a few minutes.
launches.detail_body:
**TL;DR**: [Overstand](https://overstandlabs.com/) is a personal data lab for Execs. We allow business leaders validate their intuitions against their company’s data — with their just their voice, you can go from a raw idea to an evidence-backed answer. They can even see a reproducible step-by-step process and underlying data behind it — all in a few in minutes. Have a look at our [launch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KrOwutgKsEA).\
\
After working with a bunch of larger companies, we learned something important: some of the most valuable questions are not the ones people plan dashboards for. They're the spontaneous ones, the realizations that you have mid-conversation... the "wait a minute…" moments.

Here’s an example that many of us have encountered at some point: let's say you're talking to a customer, and they say "_you know we've really struggled to figure out how to solve X at our company. Is that something you can help us with?_" They might explain why X is hard, and you'd go back and forth a little.

Then you wonder, at some point — is this just them, or have others said the same thing? Has anyone else on your 200-person GTM team heard of _X_ before? The signal is buried across massive email threads, Gong transcripts, Slack threads, and CRM notes — there’s no way to know quickly.

So this intuition fades. Perhaps you’re able to help that customer in a one-off way, but you don’t see the broader pattern.

We built Overstand to solve for this exact gap — the crevices where data collection has traditionally failed to help you. The spurious thought that you might’ve had.

You articulate your intuition in plain language — "_show me all instances of a customer indicating they're struggling with X._" Overstand builds an entire data pipeline on top of your company's comms + hard data and surfaces the underlying examples that answer your questions — in just a few minutes. From there you can drill down: ask follow-ups to hone in on specific instances, chart the results over time or pull everything into a single context to discuss what was found. You can even action each result individually — sending contextually-crafted emails to each customer who mentioned _X_.

All of this, with just your computer or phone (and you can even do it with your voice — we call it _speech-to-data-pipeline_).

Most enterprise tools are built around questions you already know to ask. Overstand is built around the ones you didn't plan for.

If you're running GTM, CS, or product at a company with real customer volume and this problem sounds familiar — we'd love to talk.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98764&key=user_uploads/1993194/7ad71368-31a7-4dca-aa7c-9139d83f452a)

launches.title: Alt-X: AI Agents for Real Estate Underwriting & Financial Modeling
launches.tagline: Alt-X is the AI agent that turns a 200-page offering memorandum into a fully built, fully auditable institutional underwriting model in Excel — in seconds.
launches.detail_body:
Hey

We're [Ryan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryan-samadi/) and [Michael](https://www.linkedin.com/in/michael-wachsman-a0912a1ab/), and we're building Alt-X.

**TL;DR**

**Download our Excel plugin from [alt-x.co](http://alt-x.co) or contact us at [ryan@alt-x.co](mailto:ryan@alt-x.co)**

 Alt-X is the first AI Excel agent built specifically for real estate underwriting. Drop in an offering memorandum and get a fully built, fully auditable financial model in seconds, directly in Excel.

We've lived the pain of financial modeling firsthand through years of late night modeling sessions, and built Alt-X to change it.

**Ask:** Our product is live and we’re looking for real estate investors, underwriters, and acquisitions analysts to try it on real deals. 

**Download our Excel plugin from [alt-x.co](http://alt-x.co) or contact us at [ryan@alt-x.co](mailto:ryan@alt-x.co)**

<https://youtu.be/wp3NBnwFs38>

**Why we built it**

Ryan spent years in the hedge fund world and institutional finance watching the same thing happen on every deal: a 200-page offering memorandum lands, IC is in 48 hours, and someone is manually pulling numbers cell by cell into Excel building capital stacks, sizing debt, modeling cash flows, building waterfalls from scratch.

The biggest firms built proprietary infrastructure to solve this. Everyone else is still doing it by hand.

**What Alt-X does**

<https://youtu.be/OqDnOfKzudk>

Alt-X lives in Excel. Drop in your OM and it automatically builds your full underwriting model: sources and uses, senior debt sized to LTV and DSCR constraints, ten-year operating cash flows, exit cap sensitivity, full GP/LP waterfall with promote tiers.

Every number is cited back to the exact page and line of the source document. Every change needs your approval before it's applied. Not blind AI. Not manual modeling. Build fast and verify everything.

**Team**

Ryan studied CS at Stanford, worked at Citadel and previously was founding engineer of a $XXMM+ commodities startup. Michael published novel ML research at Cornell and built state-of-the-art AI security systems. Together, they've lived the pain of financial modeling and have the technical depth to fix it.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98902&key=user_uploads/414472/32a9e60f-be41-46a1-a322-d04923ac4733)

**Ask**

We'd love warm intros to real estate investment firms, acquisitions teams, and asset managers. If you work in real estate finance or know someone who does, please reach out.

Download the plugin and try it on your next deal at [alt-x.co](http://alt-x.co) or email us at [ryan@alt-x.co](mailto:ryan@alt-x.co)

launches.title: FlashCompact: A specialized model for context compaction
launches.tagline: 33k tok/sec context compaction for coding agents
launches.detail_body:
We built **FlashCompact** because context compaction is one of the most broken parts of modern coding agents.

Right now, compaction is:

* slow (often 2+ minutes)
* lossy (kills useful context)
* expensive (wastes tokens and steps)

So people avoid it… and agents degrade over time.

---

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98898&key=user_uploads/405977/77e4cb4f-c326-4f2b-8602-2aca1e0fa9c3)


### What we built

A **specialized model for context compaction**:

* **33,000 tokens/sec throughput**
* **200k → 50k tokens in \~1.5s**
* Designed specifically for agent workflows, not general summarization

Compaction should feel invisible. This actually does.

---

### Why this matters

We analyzed **200+ real agent sessions** across **40+ top coding agent harnesses**.

The core insight:

> Most context bloat comes from tool responses, not model generation.

That means naive summarization fails, because it compresses the wrong things.

FlashCompact:

* removes redundant tool output
* preserves execution-relevant state
* reduces context without hurting task performance

Result:

* no performance drop
* fewer tokens
* fewer steps

---

### The deeper point

Agents don’t fail because models are weak.

They fail because their **context degrades over time**.

If you want agents to:

* run longer
* take more steps
* stay coherent across complex tasks

You need **clean, compressed context**.

<https://docs.morphllm.com/sdk/components/compact>

launches.title: Harbor: AI system of record for clinical trial data
launches.tagline: We're building the AI operating system for clinical trials, starting with a best-in-class system of record that automates the transformation of source data into an FDA-ready package.
launches.detail_body:
Hey everyone 👋

We're Albert and Nathan from Harbor.

**TL;DR**

Harbor is a new system of record for data collection in clinical trials. Current systems are slow, clunky, and require hours and hours of manual labor. We're already live in five clinical studies and looking for more!

**Ask**: Can you introduce us to founders who might be running a clinical study soon or directors and VPs of Clinical Operations at CROs, medical device, and biotech companies? Contact us at [albert@runharbor.com](mailto:albert@runharbor.com)

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mBOYEL58RWw>

**🤦‍♂️ The Problem**

Everyone knows clinical trials are slow and expensive. Most people assume it's due to subject recruitment or regulatory requirements. But, a huge part of the problem is much simpler: manual data entry.

Clinical trial data is collected through a special database called an EDC (electronic data capture). Despite the massive amounts of spend, today's EDCs have not changed since the early 2000s. Companies spend 2-3 months manually configuring their EDC for each clinical trial. Clinical sites collect data from patients in the EHR or on paper and then spend hours entering that data by hand into the company's EDC. Finally, companies hire armies of people to literally fly to each clinical site and double check the data entered into the EDC. Despite the [FDA's guidance](https://www.fda.gov/regulatory-information/search-fda-guidance-documents/risk-based-approach-monitoring-clinical-investigations-questions-and-answers) **against** this way of doing things, it remains the de facto standard for the way clinical trials are run today.

At Harbor, we're changing that…

**💡 Our Solution**

At Harbor, we've built a new EDC platform that automates the most manual and tedious processes in data management, allowing sponsors and sites to spend more time with subjects, making sure the operations are running smoothly, and ultimately getting to database lock and regulatory submission faster.

* 👷 Our "Magic Build" feature takes clinical trial protocols and turns them into customized EDC builds within minutes. 
* ✍️ Our "Magic Capture" feature allows clinical sites to upload their source documents, whether electronic or paper, and Harbor enters the data into the EDC for them automatically.
* 🕵️‍♀️ As a result, sponsors get access to the study data in near real-time and their monitors don't have to fly all over the country just to compare what's on paper with what's in the EDC.

All of this is built into our fully validated and 21 CFR Part 11 and GCP-compliant software platform with roles, audit trails, and more, so that the data collected in Harbor can be used for regulatory submissions.

![uploaded image](/media/?type=post&id=98843&key=user_uploads/2019219/426a3a2d-c750-47bc-813c-d386c2a13f21)

**🥺 Our Ask**

If you answer “yes” to any of these, we’d love your help:

* Do you know any founders of biotech, medtech, or digital health companies that might be gearing up for clinical trials? Or are you one yourself? Reach out, let us know you found us on Launch YC and we'll waive your set up fee!
* Do you know any VPs or directors of clinical operations at larger pharma, biotechs, medtechs, or CROs?
* Do you have experience selling software into pharma, biotech, or medtech companies?

👉 Contact us at [albert@runharbor.com](mailto:albert@runharbor.com)

Thank you!!

👏 **The Team**

Albert and Nate met seven years ago in English class at the University of Michigan ("Art of the Personal Essay").

Albert (CEO) helped run clinical trials and regulatory strategy at Biolinq, a medical device startup that received its FDA authorization last year. He literally lived at a clinical site for a month during the company's pivotal trial, keeping site staff entertained while they spent hours manually entering data. He also spent two years as an analyst for the medical device industry.

Nathan (CTO) has spent the last five years working at tech companies ranging from seed-stage startups to Ramp and Google. He’s built zero-to-one systems as the first employee of another YC startup and wrote smart contracts securing millions in assets at a blockchain infrastructure company. He’s now bringing his experience building cryptographically-secure, regulated, end-to-end systems to Harbor, where we’ve launched a brand-new, 21 CFR Part 11 compliant EDC in just eight months.

launches.title: 21st - Infrastructure for AI agents
launches.tagline: The production layer for shipping frontier AI agents inside your product - sandboxing, streaming, billing, UI, and observability out of the box.
launches.detail_body:
**tl;dr:** We make it stupid easy to deploy frontier AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, others) inside your product. Define your agent in TypeScript, deploy with one command, ship it to your users.

<https://youtu.be/1WcdHbyik18>

### How we got here

Last year we built [21st.dev](http://21st.dev) - a React component registry that 1.4M developers use to build UI for AI apps.

We also built our own AI agents from scratch to power the product. All custom. 15,000+ GitHub stars.

Then Claude Code arrived. We rewrote our agents on top of it - and they got better overnight than in months of our own work. That was a humbling moment.

But here's the thing - getting Claude Code into production was brutal. These agents aren't API calls. They're runtimes. They rely on bash, filesystem, persistent sandboxes. So you can't just run them on Vercel (timeouts, no fs). Then the questions start piling up. How do you sandbox securely? How do you make sure your env vars aren't stolen from the sandbox? How do you handle streaming? Billing? Observability? You end up building way more infrastructure than you planned for.

We spent 2 months deep in these problems. And then we realized - every team building on frontier agent SDKs is facing the exact same wall we just climbed over.

So we turned our infrastructure into a product.

### 21st Agents SDK

The agent SDKs give you the brain. We give you everything else.

What you get out of the box:

* Sandboxed code execution (powered by E2B) - secure, persistent
* Credential security - proxy layer so your keys never touch the sandbox
* SSE streaming, compatible with AI SDK
* Crafted agent chat UI with themes
* Usage limits & billing
* Observability

How it works: you define your agent in code - custom tools, hooks like onFinish, sandbox configuration (which files, which CLI tools, which tokens). Then you deploy with our CLI. And you have a hosted agent you can manage via API. It's AI SDK compatible so you can just plug and play on the client side.

SDK supports React, Next.js, Node, and Python.

### Why this matters now

The best agents aren't being built from scratch anymore. They're being built on top of frontier agent runtimes from Anthropic, OpenAI, and others. But shipping them to real users? That's still a mess. The gap between "agent works on my machine" and "agent works for my customers" is enormous.

We already closed that gap for ourselves. Now we're the infra layer so you don't have to.

### Try it

<https://21st.dev/agents>

If you're building with frontier AI agents and hitting production walls - we want to hear about it. DM us on X (@serafimcloud, @sergeybunas) or email [founders@21st.dev](mailto:founders@21st.dev)

---
